name: JCPOA Nuclear Deal
description: The Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA) was a landmark nuclear agreement reached on 14 July 2015 between Iran and the P5+1 (the United States, United Kingdom, France, Russia, China, and Germany). Iran agreed to limit its nuclear programme in exchange for the lifting of international sanctions. [Mohammad Javad Zarif](/people/javad-zarif) led the Iranian negotiating team under President [Hassan Rouhani](/people/hassan-rouhani). The United States withdrew from the agreement in May 2018 under President Trump, reimposing sanctions and triggering a severe economic downturn in Iran.
editorial_notes: US withdrew in 2018. Signature foreign policy achievement of Rouhani era.
